title: Phonextox1's better side shield
description: A sleek PvP side shield designed for clarity and style. Lightweight, clean, and battle-ready — perfect for fighters who want better visibility and a sharper look without losing protection
body:
A redesigned side-view PvP shield built for clarity and speed in battle.

✨ Features

✅ Slimmed shield model — more vision, less clutter

✅ FPS-friendly & lightweight

✅ Perfect for PvP duels, UHC, and crystal fights

✅ Simple, effective, and battle-tested

🎮 Why use this?

Default shields block too much of your screen. This shield keeps you covered while letting you see the fight clearly. Dominate every clash without blind spots.

-phonextox7
